summary: Design + adversarially audit the Exp 206 barcode-niche experiment; synthesize the binding pre-registration

synthesis.recommended_design_summary: Base = Design A (MINIMAL NICHE): the cleanest anti-cheat spine — NO access gate, h keys ONLY the percept sigma, the crowding discount divides intake by a creature-COUNT N_j (h-blind), intake itself stays the UNCHANGED consume(). Reject Design B/C/D's hard access gate `h>=theta_j` (a banned f(h): intake becomes a step function of h at a fixed cell — every ANTI-CHEAT and CONFOUND-HUNTER lens flagged it fatal). From the CONFOUND-HUNTER lenses (all four agreed this is THE load-bearing fix) graft: make the class signal NON-MEMORIZABLE. The recurring fatal flaw in EVERY design is that `cell_class` derived from the static temperature gradient is a permanent spatial property the learned map m[cell] encodes for free, and freeze_learning_rate does NOT kill it (it pins the EMA RATE to 0.3; the map keeps updating). So the class signature is carried on a DYNAMIC per-cell field that re-rolls — exactly as exp204 residue's fresh-fraction f=R/(R+residue) is dynamic and unmemorizable — and h keys ONLY a noisy read of the CURRENT class. From the ANTI-CHEAT lens fold: (1) the verdict-regime anti-cheat test must exercise the FULL params (niche_confusion=0 with real R_j/crowding ⇒ intake h-independent), not a deleted-mechanism config; (2) the policy class-routing must NOT introduce a second learned EMA (class_value) that CLAMPED_LR cannot freeze — routing reads the instantaneous noisy class only, no lifetime class memory; (3) a per-NICHE cohort floor (kin of sense_axis min_clamp_pop=8) gates any LINEAGE_ONLY positive so a small drift pocket cannot masquerade as selection. From the IMPLEMENTABILITY lens fold: (4) OFF byte-identity comes from the enable_niche FLAG gate ALONE (consume() draws no rng), guarded by reproducing the ONLY committed literal anchor EXP194_HASH=fc19d23... + OFF-invariance to niche_* params (the design must NOT claim nonexistent exp200/202/204 anchors); (5) pin the choose_action elif ordering and assert mutual exclusivity with band-staleness; (6) ONE rng draw, eat-step only — routing reuses the SAME single per-step class read (cached), no per-neighbor draws, so the rng-stream contract is byte-stable and the runtime is bounded. The honest fold of the ANTI-CHEAT/IMPLEMENTABILITY demographic analyses: this re-imports the exp204/205 collapse-vs-functional trap on the niche_crowding axis, and the local gradient at the resident (h=0.10→0.15, sigma 0.54→0.51, a tiny percept improvement) is barely steep where it must be steepest — so the honest prior remains NEGATIVE (a clean sixth wall) with a real-but-narrow chance of LINEAGE_ONLY_POSITIVE.
synthesis.mechanism_final: GATED FEATURE `enable_niche` (default OFF). NEW WORLD STATE, allocated ONLY when ON (mirrors enable_residue): (a) `class_phase: float[n_cells]` — a per-cell hidden phase in [0,1), assigned once at construction by PURE ARITHMETIC from cell index (no rng, no temperature dependence, so it is NOT spatially memorizable-as-value); (b) `class_signal: float[n_cells]` — a DYNAMIC per-cell class signal recomputed each step from class_phase AND a global rotating offset omega(t)=t*niche_rotation mod 1: a cell's TRUE class j(pos,t) = floor(K*frac(class_phase[pos]+omega(t))). Because omega(t) rotates, a cell's class CHANGES over time on a schedule no static map m[cell] can encode (the residue-style non-memorizability fix); only an instantaneous noisy READ tells the creature the current class. K=2 (A=common, B=rarer). (c) `class_occ_prev: int[K]` and `class_occ_cur: int[K]` — per-step occupancy counters (telemetry, no rng, NOT in events_hash). THE READ + DISCRIMINATION (eat hook in _step_one_creature, a NEW `elif cfg.enable_niche and self.world.class_phase is not None:` BESIDE the residue branch; ONE rng.normal drawn ONLY in this ON branch and ONLY when deficit>0): true class j = current class of the cell; the creature reads `j_hat_signal = class_signal[pos] + N(0, sigma)`, sigma = niche_confusion*(1-h) (h = thermosense_intensity), and infers c_read = floor(K*frac(j_hat_signal)). It EATS via the UNCHANGED `eaten = consume(pos, deficit)` and KEEPS `kept = eaten/(1 + niche_crowding * class_occ_prev[ j_true ])` — the discount uses the cell's TRUE class j and the PREVIOUS step's frozen occupancy count of that class (order-independent, deterministic), NEVER c_read or h. It increments class_occ_cur[j_true]. The single cached read is REUSED for routing: the policy's gated forage sub-branch (one cached value, NO extra draw) biases the next step toward neighbours whose current class the creature can resolve as the rarer/less-crowded one — but routing reads only the instantaneous c_read, holds NO lifetime class EMA (so CLAMPED_LR freezing the resource-map rate fully covers all learned state). CROWDING = THE FREQUENCY-DEPENDENCE: low-h creatures misread the rotating class and herd onto whichever class they THINK is food; a precise creature reads the true current class and routes to the under-occupied one, enjoying a low class_occ_prev discount — exactly when rivals crowd the other class. As h spreads both classes equalize (negative-frequency once h is common) ⇒ a polymorphism / LINEAGE branch, not a global sweep. The ROTATION is what makes this structurally distinct from exp200/202 (static spatial band) AND defeats the memory free-ride.
synthesis.anti_cheat_argument: NO food/fitness is f(h), by four structural facts. (1) Intake is the UNCHANGED consume(pos,deficit) — byte-identical to exp194; the amount eaten depends only on resource[pos]. (2) The kept-multiplier 1/(1+niche_crowding*class_occ_prev[j_true]) divides by a COUNT OF CREATURE BODIES in the cell's TRUE class — a high-h and a low-h creature standing on the same cell with the same true class j get the IDENTICAL discount (guarded by test_crowding_is_h_blind). The denominator is computed from j_true (the cell's actual current class) and the FROZEN previous-step occupancy snapshot, NEVER from c_read and NEVER from h. (3) h enters at EXACTLY ONE site: sigma = niche_confusion*(1-h) in the noisy signal read class_signal[pos]+N(0,sigma) — h keys only the PERCEPTUAL QUALITY of "which class is this cell right now", exactly as exp204's residue sigma keyed only the freshness percept. There is NO access gate (no `if h>=theta: eat`), NO class is intrinsically richer (both classes draw from the same consume()), NO `if h>theta: bonus`, NO top-K, NO ranking. (4) There is NO second learned state: routing reuses the single cached instantaneous read, holding no lifetime class EMA, so the only thing the verdict can ride is the costed organ (CLAMPED_LR pins the one remaining learned structure, the resource map). The ADVANTAGE EMERGES purely: precise read → route to the genuinely under-crowded current class → land where class_occ_prev is low → consume()+the h-blind discount give more kept energy → more offspring; every causal link except the percept noise is h-blind. ARCHIVE: a pure post-hoc RECORDER of (modal true class occupied, lineage_root) computed from the creature dump — never read by survival/reproduction, never preserves high h; ARCHIVE_OFF must give a byte-identical events_hash (proves it is inert). BINDING GUARD: test_no_direct_h_reward_confusion_zero asserts that at niche_confusion=0 (perfect read for EVERY h) the realized KEPT-intake AND offspring count are h-INDEPENDENT, run at the FULL verdict params (real niche_crowding, real K) — not a deleted-mechanism config (the ANTI-CHEAT lens's key fix). If a positive gradient survives at niche_confusion=0, the reward leaked and the experiment is INVALID, not negative.
synthesis.gated_feature_spec: DEFAULT-OFF FLAGS on EcologyConfig: `enable_niche: bool = False` (master), plus no-op params `niche_classes: int = 2`, `niche_rotation: float = 0.0` (per-step class-phase rotation rate; 0 ⇒ static, but the verdict uses >0 so classes rotate — the non-memorizability lever), `niche_confusion: float = 0.6` (the sigma scale / signature difficulty), `niche_crowding: float = 0.0` (discount strength, FIXED on a disclosed pilot). OFF-PATH BYTE-IDENTITY (the established enable_residue pattern, secured by the FLAG gate ALONE — consume() draws ZERO rng, so OFF-identity does NOT depend on the deficit>0 condition; the deficit>0 placement only matches the conditional consume so ON-stream is clean): (a) when enable_niche=False, world.class_phase/class_signal/class_occ_* stay None/unallocated (the ONLY allocation site is `if cfg.enable_niche:` in __init__); (b) the eat step keeps the EXACT existing `if cfg.enable_residue ... else: consume` ladder — the niche branch is a NEW `elif cfg.enable_niche and self.world.class_phase is not None:` placed so the OFF path reaches the identical structure with no reordering; (c) THE ONE rng.normal is drawn ONLY inside the ON eat-branch and ONLY when deficit>0; (d) the choose_action niche sub-branch is gated `elif world.enable_niche and world.forage_mode:` placed with a PINNED elif order AND an `assert not (enable_niche and enable_band_staleness)` mutual-exclusion guard (mirroring the engine.py:305 band-staleness assert) so it cannot be silently shadowed; it returns within itself and draws NO new rng (reuses the cached eat-step read), so OFF-path rng is identical; (e) class_signal recompute + class_occ_prev<-cur swap run inside `if cfg.enable_niche:` in step(), no rng, not in events_hash; class_phase is pure arithmetic at construction (no rng). NEW STATE NEVER ENTERS events_hash (mirrors tp_count/fp_count + residue discipline); per-creature modal-class counter lives on the PHENOTYPE (survives engine.py:664 release_maps, which only touches the policy). REGRESSION HASH GUARD (tests/test_exp206_niche.py): (i) test_niche_off_byte_identical — reproduce the ONLY committed literal anchor EXP194_HASH=fc19d23fefede56aa3c751281db9e74da8520f449e4198bb2237910613304ae4 from SCENARIOS['balanced']+enable_niche=False, AND assert events_hash invariant to nonsense niche_* params on a compete-regime cfg with enable_niche=False (the test_residue_off_byte_identical_and_no_field pattern); (do NOT reference nonexistent exp200/202/204 literal anchors). (ii) test_niche_on_nontrivial — class_phase allocated, class_occ accumulates, at least one c_read differs from j_true under rotation. (iii) test_no_direct_h_reward_confusion_zero — niche_confusion=0 ⇒ kept-intake AND offspring h-independent at FULL verdict params. (iv) test_crowding_is_h_blind — two creatures (h=0.0,h=0.9) same cell same j_true get byte-identical kept. (v) test_niche_on_determinism_under_shuffle — same seed ⇒ identical events_hash with shuffle_creature_order=True (discount reads only class_occ_prev, never class_occ_cur mid-loop).
controls_final: SINGLE_NICHE (necessity on the niche axis): niche_classes=1 ⇒ one class, crowding is global, no second niche to escape into — the exp202 stampede with no escape. Predeclared primitive (h*<=0.15, evolution<0.15).

BARCODE_SHUFFLED (decisive placebo): the c_read↔value mapping is decorrelated (a per-seed static permutation of which inferred class is the under-crowded one relative to the rotation) so reading the signal precisely tells you NOTHING actionable about crowding; h still pays its cost and still reduces sigma but the percept is uninformative. Predeclared primitive — isolates that the signal must MAP to value, not merely be readable.

STATIC_NICHE / MEMORY-KILL (the load-bearing memory control, kin of the CONFOUND-HUNTER required fix): niche_rotation=0 ⇒ class is a STATIC per-cell property ⇒ the learned map m[cell] CAN memorize it. Predeclared to ALSO climb if the positive is memory-routed. A genuine sensor positive must appear under rotation>0 (NICHE_COMPETE) but NOT under STATIC_NICHE — proving routing needs the instantaneous costed read, not a static spatial map. This is the control that distinguishes a real sensor positive from the static-class free-ride that killed every base design.

NO_CROWDING (frequency-dependence necessity): niche_crowding=0 ⇒ classes never discount ⇒ no benefit to occupying the rare class ⇒ flat. Isolates that POSITIVE-frequency-dependence is the driver, not class-reading per se.

COST_OFF (diagnostic B(h) overlay ONLY, never the verdict): enable_thermosense=False pins h with organ active, NO upkeep, via run_installed_benefit — shows a gifted precise creature out-forages a crude one in the niche world (gift real), contrasted with the realized local gradient g(0.10) per L22.
ARCHIVE_OFF: the niche/lineage recorder disabled must give a byte-identical events_hash to ARCHIVE_ON (the archive records roles, never feeds back — no-hidden-evaluator).

CLAMPED_LR (memory-substitution killer, L19): freeze_learning_rate=True in the primary niche-compete arm — the resource map cannot be sharpened as a non-thermal substitute. Especially load-bearing alongside STATIC_NICHE; together they bracket the memory channel.

NO_SHUFFLE (id-order killer, L24): shuffle_creature_order=False — a positive that flips sign is a birth-order eat-first artifact. (Discount uses class_occ_prev frozen pre-loop, so within-step order cannot create an eat-first asymmetry — verified by the determinism-under-shuffle test.)

CLAMP-GRID LOCAL-GRADIENT AUDIT (the L22/L1 verdict instrument): sense_axis common garden (founder_mix over CLAMP_GRID, freeze_thermosense, cost ON, shuffle ON, placement-shuffled per seed) + pairwise s(0.10 vs 0.15) [invader-won fraction + AUC] in the niche-compete world — the REALIZED local resident gradient, not the installed endpoint. Plus a NICHE_CONFUSION=0 anti-cheat audit arm.
synthesis.pre_registration_markdown:
**EXP 206 — FULL PRE-REGISTRATION (ROTATING-CLASS NICHE / SYMPATRIC-DIVERGENCE BRIDGE; committed BEFORE any data; synthesizes Design A's clean spine + the four CONFOUND-HUNTER non-memorizability fixes + the ANTI-CHEAT/IMPLEMENTABILITY folds).**

- **Motivation.** Five walls (199–205) found the local selection gradient at the resident g(0.10) <= 0 even when a pure precise population is genuinely fitter and survives (Exp 205, sharpest). The ONE structurally-distinct escape left: positive-frequency-dependence via a private, less-crowded niche a high-h lineage can ONLY access by discriminating an overlapping class signature. Crowding should make precision pay MORE as rivals herd into the common class (Red-Queen sign d²B/dh_i d(mean h_rivals) > 0), flipping the local gradient positive.

- **Hypothesis (one sentence).** Under a rotating two-class niche where precision keys only a noisy read of a cell's CURRENT (time-rotating, non-memorizable) class and crowding on the cell's TRUE class discounts intake, a stable high-sensor lineage escapes into the under-crowded class (LINEAGE_ONLY_POSITIVE) — or the gene-pool mean crosses functional (NICHE_BRANCH_POSITIVE) — with the realized local resident gradient positive, MEDIATED by correct class routing, knockout-sensitive, and not a memory/drift/id-order/anti-cheat confound.

- **Mechanism (PROVIDED, gated `enable_niche`, default OFF ⇒ exp194–205 byte-identical, hash-guarded).** World gains, ON-only: `class_phase[n_cells]` (pure-arithmetic per-cell phase, NO rng, NOT temperature-derived); a DYNAMIC `class_signal` recomputed each step from class_phase + a rotating global offset omega(t)=frac(t*niche_rotation) so a cell's true class j(pos,t)=floor(K*frac(class_phase[pos]+omega(t))) CHANGES over time (defeats static-map memorization — the residue-style non-memorizability fix); per-step `class_occ_prev/cur[K]` counters. At the eat step (ON branch, ONE rng draw, deficit>0 only): c_read = floor(K*frac(class_signal[pos] + N(0, niche_confusion*(1-h)))); intake = UNCHANGED consume(pos,deficit); kept = eaten/(1 + niche_crowding*class_occ_prev[j_true]) (discount on the cell's TRUE class via the FROZEN prev-step count — h-blind); increment class_occ_cur[j_true]. Routing reuses the SAME cached read (no extra rng, no lifetime class EMA). K=2, niche_rotation>0 in the verdict regime.

- **Anti-cheat (PROVIDED, binding).** consume() unchanged; h keys ONLY sigma; the crowding divisor is a creature-COUNT on j_true (never c_read, never h); no access gate, no `if h>θ`, no top-K. test_no_direct_h_reward_confusion_zero asserts kept-intake AND offspring h-independent at niche_confusion=0 WITH the FULL verdict params (not a deleted mechanism). test_crowding_is_h_blind, test_niche_off_byte_identical (reproduces EXP194_HASH + OFF-invariance to niche_* params), test_niche_on_determinism_under_shuffle.

- **Two modes (the exp203/204 instrument + evolution confirmation).** MODE A — GRADIENT AUDIT: clamp-grid common garden (founder_mix, freeze_thermosense, cost ON, shuffle ON, placement-shuffled) + pairwise s(0.10 vs 0.15) + carrying-capacity N*(h) in NICHE_COMPETE vs the controls; the realized local resident gradient. MODE B — EVOLUTION: h evolves freely from founder 0.10 (freeze_thermosense=False) in NICHE_COMPETE; gene-pool newborn mean h + per-lineage h + modal class occupancy.

- **Arms** (founder h=0.10, inefficiency 0.20, cost ON, shuffle ON unless noted; depleting band regen 0.08 / conc 14 / band 0.08 as exp202/204): NICHE_COMPETE (primary, niche_rotation>0) · SINGLE_NICHE (K=1) · BARCODE_SHUFFLED (signal↔value decorrelated) · STATIC_NICHE (niche_rotation=0, the memory-kill control) · NO_CROWDING (niche_crowding=0) · NO_SHUFFLE · CLAMPED_LR · ARCHIVE_OFF · COST_OFF (B(h) overlay) · CONFUSION_ZERO (anti-cheat). niche_crowding + niche_confusion + niche_rotation FIXED on a DISCLOSED full-horizon pilot (L23) demonstrating a window with BOTH a separable+occupied niche AND survivable pop.

- **Seeds / horizon.** Audit {50–57} (8, for the ≥7/8 slope bar); diag {50,51,52}; evolution {90–94} (5 FRESH, never used). Audit horizon 3500 (exp203/204-matched); evolution horizon 8000 (exp204/205-matched, plateau-verified on the disclosed pilot). Newborn window [6000,8000]. Runtime pre-flight (RB.preflight, require_safe=True) at the top of main(), probed at the ACTUAL founder h=0.10 (NOT forced h=0 — the exp205 lesson), probe_steps>=3000 (L26 logistic plateau).

- **Predeclared verdict (three-way, conjunct-by-conjunct; two positive grades).**
  P2 VALIDITY (L21/L24): NICHE_COMPETE reaches horizon with final_pop >= HEALTHY_FLOOR=30 in ≥4/5 seeds, measurable newborn cohort; corr(pop, newborn_h) >= −0.4 across seeds; class B genuinely occupied (mean B-occupants >= 3 late-window). Per-NICHE cohort floor: any qualifying lineage must sustain >= 15 living members across the stability span with corr(lineage_pop, lineage_h) >= −0.4 (drift-guarded at sub-population level).
  P3 LOCAL GRADIENT (Mode A, CORE): pairwise s(0.10→0.15) invader_won ≥ 7/8 AND inv_frac_auc > 0.5 AND clamp-grid slope at h0.10 > 0 in ≥7/8 AND competitive optimum h*(N*) > 0.30; CLAMPED_LR agrees (won ≥ 7/8); NO_SHUFFLE does not flip sign.
  P4 EVOLUTION (Mode B): NICHE_COMPETE newborn mean h > 0.30 in ≥4/5 valid seeds (GLOBAL functional) — OR LINEAGE path: a stable lineage with parent-weighted newborn h > 0.30 persisting ≥ 1500 steps even if global mean stays moderate.
  P5 OCCUPANCY PREDICTED BY h: I(h_bucket; modal_class) > 0.05 bits in ≥4/5 seeds AND higher-h creatures' occupancy skewed toward the under-crowded class; drops to ~0 in BARCODE_SHUFFLED.
  P6 KNOCKOUT-SENSITIVITY (load-bearing): clamp the evolved high-h lineage's h to ≈0.10 (breed true, same world); its under-crowded-class occupancy collapses AND per-capita intake/reproduction drops ≥ 25%.
  P7 NECESSITY: SINGLE_NICHE, BARCODE_SHUFFLED, STATIC_NICHE, NO_CROWDING all stay primitive (h* ≤ 0.15 AND evolution < 0.15).
  P8 ANTI-CHEAT: CONFUSION_ZERO shows the gradient/occupancy-by-h signal VANISHES; STATIC_NICHE does not out-climb NICHE_COMPETE (memory free-ride dead); assert_no_direct_h_reward + no-hidden-evaluator structural tests pass.
  - **NICHE_BRANCH_POSITIVE** (strongest, FIRST positive in the arc) iff P2 ∧ P3 ∧ P4-global ∧ P5 ∧ P6 ∧ P7 ∧ P8.
  - **LINEAGE_ONLY_POSITIVE** iff P4-global FAILS but a lineage is STABLE (≥1500 steps) ∧ HERITABLE (newborns carry h>0.30) ∧ ECOLOGICAL (P5 for that lineage) ∧ KNOCKOUT-SENSITIVE (P6) ∧ meets the per-niche cohort floor ∧ P2/P3/P7/P8 hold. Counts ONLY with all four properties; if P6 fails → downgrade to MIXED.
  - **NEGATIVE (the SIXTH wall)** iff despite a real COST_OFF gift (gifted precision out-forages in the niche) NICHE_COMPETE stays primitive (evolution < 0.15 majority AND/OR h* ≤ 0.15) and no stable knockout-sensitive lineage forms — the herding/negative-frequency-dependence is NOT escapable even with a separable, value-mapped, non-memorizable, crowding-discounted niche.
  - **MIXED** iff partial ([0.15,0.30] gradient, positive only Mode A not Mode B, lineage heritable but knockout-insensitive, or drift-flagged), OR NO_VERDICT (no survivable separable occupied niche found = F2).
  - Repo token: POSITIVE for either positive grade; NEGATIVE for the sixth wall; MIXED otherwise.

- **Falsifiers.** F1 non-determinism (same seed → different events_hash) OR OFF-path EXP194_HASH/niche_*-invariance mismatch OR determinism-under-shuffle fails → NEGATIVE (infra). F2 no survivable separable occupied niche (NICHE_COMPETE collapses <4/5 at every survivable niche_crowding, or class B never occupied, or BARCODE_SHUFFLED indistinguishable on occupancy) → NO_VERDICT → MIXED. F3 branch erased by global averaging (transient lineage, no stable persist) → NEGATIVE. F4 positive only via DRIFT (corr(pop,h)<−0.4 or only <4/5 valid, or sub-pop below the per-niche cohort floor) → DISCARD → MIXED (L24). F5 MEMORY: positive vanishes under CLAMPED_LR, OR STATIC_NICHE ALSO climbs → memory-routed, DISCARD (L19). F6 ID-ORDER: flips under NO_SHUFFLE → DISCARD (L24). F7 ANTI-CHEAT LEAK: positive survives at niche_confusion=0, OR BARCODE_SHUFFLED climbs > 0.30, OR crowding found to depend on h → POSITIVE DISCARDED / INVALID. F8 KNOCKOUT-INSENSITIVE: P6 fails → LINEAGE_ONLY downgraded to MIXED.

- **Honesty stakes (written before data).** The five walls + Exp 205's sharpest finding (the local gradient is the sole binding barrier, and at h=0.10→0.15 the sigma improvement 0.54→0.51 is tiny exactly where it must be steep) predict NEGATIVE; a positive is a genuine surprise. The rotation, niche_crowding, niche_confusion are tuned ONLY on a disclosed full-horizon pilot and FIXED before the verdict; the pilot MUST exhibit a window with both a separable+occupied niche and survivable pop or the experiment is NO_VERDICT, not run on faith. The verdict is the EVOLVED gene-pool / realized local gradient (Mode B + Mode A), NEVER the COST_OFF gift (L22). Founders + policy + costs PROVIDED; the sensor is a noisy-percept heuristic. Engine gated; exp194–205 hashes reproduce. A NEGATIVE makes this a clean sixth wall — the strongest, most general form: precision is un-earnable even WITH a private, value-mapped, non-memorizable, crowding-discounted niche.
synthesis.confound_mitigation_table:
| Confound | How THIS design neutralizes it |
|---|---|
| STATIC-SPATIAL-CLASS MEMORY FREE-RIDE (the fatal flaw in ALL 4 base designs; CLAMPED_LR alone cannot kill it) | Class is carried on a DYNAMIC, time-ROTATING per-cell signal (omega(t)), NOT the static temperature gradient — a cell's class CHANGES on a schedule no static map m[cell] can encode, so spatial memory cannot substitute for the instantaneous costed read (the residue non-memorizability template). PLUS the STATIC_NICHE control (niche_rotation=0) predeclared to climb iff the positive is memory-routed: a real positive must appear under rotation but NOT under STATIC_NICHE. |
| Resource-memory free-ride / cheap-trait substitution (L19) | CLAMPED_LR (freeze_learning_rate) arm; the niche read is instantaneous (no lifetime class EMA — routing reuses the single cached read), so the ONLY learned structure is the resource map, which CLAMPED_LR pins; a positive must survive it. |
| ACCESS GATE = banned f(h) (Design B/C/D fatal) | REMOVED entirely. No `h>=theta` anywhere in eat/extraction. h keys ONLY the percept sigma; intake = unchanged consume(); kept-multiplier divides by a creature-COUNT on j_true (h-blind, test_crowding_is_h_blind). |
| Steering-vs-eat split / free niche access (the exp200 fatal flaw) | Routing reads the NOISY instantaneous class (not true class) via the SAME cached h-keyed read — a crude sensor genuinely cannot find the under-crowded current class; access is h-keyed, not free. CONFUSION_ZERO arm certifies access h-independent when the percept is perfect. |
| no-direct-h-reward leak (verdict-regime, not a deleted mechanism) | test_no_direct_h_reward_confusion_zero asserts kept-intake AND offspring h-independent at niche_confusion=0 WITH FULL verdict params (real niche_crowding, K) — the ANTI-CHEAT lens's key fix; a counter-only test would miss a leak through the intake multiplier. |
| Second rng-draw site / runtime / OFF byte-identity | ONE rng.normal, eat-step only, gated on the enable_niche FLAG (consume() draws no rng, so OFF-identity rests on the flag alone). Routing draws NO new rng (cached read). OFF-path guarded by reproducing EXP194_HASH + niche_*-param invariance. |
| Determinism under shuffle | The crowding discount reads class_occ_PREV (frozen pre-loop snapshot), never class_occ_cur mid-loop; test_niche_on_determinism_under_shuffle asserts identical events_hash with shuffle ON. |
| id-order eat-first (L24) | shuffle_creature_order=True for every verdict; NO_SHUFFLE control; class_occ_prev frozen ⇒ no within-step eat-first asymmetry. |
| free-trait substitution (L20) | temperature_tolerance held at founder, stress_scale=0 (forage regime, no thermal stress to escape for free); knockout (P6) isolates h as the causal trait. |
| drift / collapse (L24) — whole-pop | HEALTHY_FLOOR=30, ≥4/5 valid (L21), corr(pop,newborn_h) >= −0.4 binding; functional h at collapsed pops DISCARDED (F4). |
| drift at the verdict-bearing sub-population (the ANTI-CHEAT lens's lineage-pocket fix) | Per-NICHE cohort floor: a qualifying lineage must sustain >= 15 living members with corr(lineage_pop, lineage_h) >= −0.4 across the stability span — a single-digit founder-lottery pocket cannot satisfy P4/P5/P6. |
| demographic-collapse trap (exp204/205, niche_crowding ≈ residue_loss) | Disclosed full-horizon pilot must EXHIBIT a niche_crowding window with BOTH a separable+occupied niche AND ≥4/5 survivable pop BEFORE the verdict; if none exists → F2 NO_VERDICT (honest), not a faked positive. |
| signal must MAP to value, not just be readable | BARCODE_SHUFFLED placebo (signal↔crowding decorrelated) predeclared primitive; if it climbs, POSITIVE DISCARDED (F7). |
| frequency-dependence is the driver, not class-reading | NO_CROWDING (niche_crowding=0) predeclared primitive (P7 necessity). |
| archive preserves h / hidden evaluator | Archive is post-hoc RECORDER (modal class + lineage_root); ARCHIVE_OFF must give byte-identical events_hash; no top-K/ranking; test_no_global_fitness_selection still passes. |
| L22 forced-vs-evolvable | Verdict is Mode B gene-pool + Mode A local slope; COST_OFF gift is a DIAGNOSTIC only, the predeclared NEGATIVE-side evidence. |
synthesis.runtime_plan: JOB COUNT (mirrors exp204, parallel over jobs). Mode A audit: capacity grid (9 clamps × 8 seeds × {NICHE_COMPETE, SINGLE_NICHE, STATIC_NICHE, NO_CROWDING, BARCODE_SHUFFLED} = 360, trim to seeds {50-53} → ~180 if runtime-bound) + pairwise s(0.10 vs 0.15) × 8 seeds × {primary, CLAMPED_LR, NO_SHUFFLE, BARCODE_SHUFFLED, CONFUSION_ZERO} = 40 + pairwise 0.10-vs-{0.06,0.30,0.45} × 8 = 24 + COST_OFF B(h) growth × 9 clamps × 3 diag-seeds × {cost-off, cost-on} = 54 ≈ ~300–480 audit jobs at horizon 3500. Mode B evolution: {NICHE_COMPETE, SINGLE_NICHE, STATIC_NICHE, NO_CROWDING, BARCODE_SHUFFLED} × 5 fresh seeds {90-94} = 25 + knockout arm × 5 = 30 evo jobs at horizon 8000. Total ≈ 230–510 jobs — same order as exp204 (~225 jobs, ~3000s budget). POP × HORIZON: the depleting niche-compete regime equilibrates at the exp202/204/205 band-compete scale (pop ~60–130, NOT the abundant-explosion regime) — niche_crowding ACTIVELY SUPPRESSES per-capita gain so explosion is LESS likely than the residue arms. Per L26 runtime ≈ c·Σ_t pop·jobs, c≈4–5 µs/creature-step, ~30 evo jobs × ~100 mean-pop × 8000 steps ≈ 2.4e7 creature-steps for the heavy tier, comparable to one exp205 batch across ~16 workers (tens of minutes to ~1 hour). RUNTIME PRE-FLIGHT (L25, require_safe=True) at top of main(): probe NICHE_COMPETE AND STATIC_NICHE at the ACTUAL founder h=0.10 (NOT forced h=0 — at niche_confusion=0.6 a pure-h=0 pop reads class at max noise and could herd/explode, a regime that never occurs in evolution; the exp205 disclosed-deviation pattern), probe_steps>=3000 (L26 logistic plateau visible only after t~2000 — a shorter probe cries wolf). There is NO abundant arm (SINGLE_NICHE/NO_CROWDING/STATIC_NICHE all use depleting regen 0.08), so no explosion-prone arm; the pre-flight should PASS bounded. CAVEAT (collapse is the OPPOSITE failure preflight cannot see): the disclosed full-horizon pilot (L23) is the binding survivability check, not the pre-flight. Batch REFUSES to launch on any EXPLOSION/SUPERLINEAR/OVER_BUDGET flag.
residual_risks: DEMOGRAPHIC COLLAPSE = NO_VERDICT (highest-probability non-finding, the exp204/205 trap on the niche_crowding axis): niche_crowding plays the structural role residue_loss did — large enough to make precision pay tends to starve the crowding majority. Exp 205 found NO survivable-AND-functional regime existed for residue_loss; the burden is on the disclosed pilot to show the rotating-niche crowding axis is different. If no window gives both a separable+occupied niche AND >=4/5 survivable pop, the disposition is MIXED/NO_VERDICT (F2), not a clean negative.

LOCAL GRADIENT TOO SHALLOW AT THE RESIDENT (the exp205 fitness-valley objection, likely the true cause of a NEGATIVE): at h=0.10->0.15 sigma only falls 0.54->0.51, so a rare invader's read is barely sharper than the resident's exactly where the slope must be steep; the positive-frequency-dependence pays only once high-h is COMMON. So even with a clean niche the realized g(0.10) may stay <=0 — LINEAGE_ONLY is the realistic best case, a global sweep (P4-global) is unlikely.

ROTATION MAY OVER-DEGRADE READABILITY OR DEFEAT ROUTING: a rotation fast enough to defeat memorization may make the current class too stochastic for even a precise sensor to route on (the class is gone by next step), collapsing the affordance — pilot must show high-h occupancy-skew survives the rotation, else the niche is inert (NO_VERDICT).

POLYMORPHISM may not STABILIZE: negative-frequency-dependence once h spreads can erode the branch before a lineage persists >=1500 steps (F3) — a transient high-h pocket that never meets the per-niche cohort floor -> MIXED, not a positive.

CONTROLLER-vs-SENSOR bleed (206/207): if the routing affordance never deploys within short compete-regime lifespans, a NEGATIVE could be misattributed to the sensor when the real cause is an undeployed organ — mitigated by a deployed-routing diagnostic (realized occupancy-skew while alive) but a residual interpretation risk.

GRID/CLASS GRANULARITY: K=2 on a 12x12 grid with a rotating phase must yield enough cells per current class to sustain an occupied niche AND a non-degenerate discrimination; if classes are too coarse the percept gap is trivial or the niche too small to occupy (NO_VERDICT). Pilot must report per-class cell counts.

ANTI-CHEAT subtlety in the kept-multiplier: the discount multiplies INTAKE through j_true; a single implementation slip (discounting by c_read or any residual h term) would make intake=f(h) — guarded by test_no_direct_h_reward_confusion_zero at FULL params + test_crowding_is_h_blind, but it is the most cheatable surface and demands code review.
synthesis.honest_predicted_outcome: Honest prior: LIKELY NEGATIVE (a clean SIXTH wall), with a real-but-modest chance of LINEAGE_ONLY_POSITIVE and a low chance of NICHE_BRANCH_POSITIVE — a falsifiable prediction, not a hope. Reasoning from the five walls: Exp 205 established that the LOCAL gradient at the resident, not demographic collapse, is the sole binding barrier, and that it stays <=0 even when a pure precise population is genuinely fitter and survives. The rotating-niche mechanism is the one structurally-distinct lever (positive-frequency-dependence via a private less-crowded class) the arc has not cleanly tested, AND this synthesis is the first design that actually neutralizes the static-class memory free-ride that confounded every prior niche attempt — so it deserves a fair shot. BUT two walls remain standing: (1) at the resident h=0.10->0.15 the percept improvement (sigma 0.54->0.51) is tiny exactly where the gradient must be steep, and the crowding advantage pays MORE only once high-h is already common — so the local slope a rare mutant faces is probably still flat/negative; (2) the niche_crowding strong enough to make precision pay re-imports the exp204/205 collapse trap, and Exp 205 found no survivable-AND-functional window existed for the analogous residue_loss. The most probable outcome is EITHER a clean NEGATIVE at survivable pop (the gift is real in COST_OFF but un-earnable — the sixth wall, the strongest publishable form) OR a NO_VERDICT if the pilot cannot find a window with both a separable occupied niche and a survivable population. A LINEAGE_ONLY_POSITIVE is the realistic best case IF the rotation makes correct routing genuinely valuable and a high-h pocket stabilizes above the per-niche cohort floor — but I predict against it more often than for it. A global functional sweep (NICHE_BRANCH_POSITIVE) is unlikely given the negative-frequency-dependence that erodes the advantage as h spreads. If even this clean, non-memorizable, value-mapped, crowding-discounted private niche cannot lift g(0.10) above zero, that is the definitive answer the sub-arc has been converging on — and it would justify accepting the six-experiment answer over building Exp 207.
